deploy.startCommand: echo '=== PATH ===' && echo $PATH && echo '=== Python ===' && python --version && echo '=== checking uvicorn ===' && which uvicorn || echo 'uvicorn not on PATH' && ls /mise/installs/python/3.12.13/bin/ | grep -E 'uvicorn|alembic' && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT
